rows.residual_risk: Keep traceability current when new arithmetic backends or representations land
Expand edge-case catalogs whenever new public parsers or envelope formats are added

Formal/no-secret-branch and no-secret-memory guarantees still retain manual/formal-tool residual risk; keep the CT route table and deterministic CT evidence current when secret-bearing ABI surfaces change
New protocol features must add misuse tests before claims are upgraded
Hostile-caller quartet is currently closed for the exported ABI; keep the manifest, invalid-input grammar, and stateful misuse evidence current when new exports land
Real-device backend diversity still depends on available hardware, especially future ROCm/HIP evidence

rows.failure_class: Documentation drift and public overclaim risk
rows.residual_risk: More subsystem docs still need the same claim-ID and stale-drift discipline as top-level docs

rows.failure_class: Audit harness quality and evidence drift
rows.residual_risk: Mutation kill remains the heavier batch lane; keep its report cadence current when touching core arithmetic or audit harnesses
GPU reproducibility and artifact retention should keep expanding alongside backend docs
Any new path class missing from the graph remains an assurance gap until indexed; library audit scripts and harnesses must stay visible in both the library-local graph and the workspace root graph

GitHub-native services and some platform-specific integrations still sit outside pure local reproduction, but the repository-maintained local parity and workflow inventory provide deterministic owner-grade coverage for drift in tracked surfaces
Non-blocking for current audit validity; promote only when AMD hardware-backed evidence exists
Automated via `check_formal_invariants.py`; 7 critical operations with preconditions, postconditions, and CT linkage validated
SLA enforcement infra complete; `DETERMINISM_GOLDEN.json` generated and validated; `audit_sla_check.py` returns `release_ready: True`; `check_determinism_gate.py` returns `overall_pass: True
Three automated drills (key compromise, CI poisoning, dependency compromise) run as preflight step 20/20

checks.name: reproducible_build
checks.note: Full reproducible build comparison requires two independent builds
